title: TaskRetired payload
description: Emitted when a task is removed entirely from the projection (not transitioned to a status like 'cancelled' / 'closed' — the row is gone). Used by the synthetic-event backfill in migration 062 to retire the 6 phantom task slugs (flip-write-contract-*) that the pre-8f2cb87 buggy forge-task-delete path removed from CRUD without emitting a retirement event. Future use cases: any code path that legitimately removes a task from existence (rare; the substrate generally prefers status transitions). The fold DELETEs the projection row and any task_blockers edges it participates in.

reason.description: Why the task was retired. Free text — typically references the historical cause (e.g. 'pre-8f2cb87 forge-task-delete buggy path; retired retroactively in migration 062'). Optional.
